zh-CN.name: 彩椒
zh-CN.intro: 彩椒是一种颜色鲜艳的蔬菜，有红、黄、绿等颜色，吃起来脆脆甜甜的，像一个个小灯笼挂在枝头。

story.title: 🎨彩椒宝宝换新衣
story.body: 菜园里住着彩椒宝宝，它们一开始都穿着绿衣服。太阳公公每天照啊照，彩椒宝宝觉得热了，就换上了黄衣服。又过了几天，它们觉得更热了，换上了红衣服。小兔子跳过来，惊讶地说：“哇！你们会变魔术吗？”彩椒宝宝笑着说：“是太阳公公帮我们换的呀！”小兔子摘下一个红彩椒，咬了一口，又脆又甜，汁水多多。它高兴地和小伙伴们分享，大家坐在一起，咔嚓咔嚓吃得可开心了。彩椒宝宝也很开心，因为它们让朋友们尝到了甜甜的滋味。

knowledge.title: 彩椒为什么这么甜？
knowledge.body: 彩椒是辣椒的亲戚，但不辣，还很甜。红彩椒比青椒更甜，因为它在藤上待得久，积累了更多糖分。彩椒富含维生素C，吃了能让身体棒，皮肤好！

en.name: Bell Pepper
en.intro: A bell pepper is a colorful vegetable that can be red, yellow, or green. It tastes crisp and sweet, and looks like a little lantern hanging on the plant.

story.title: 🎨Bell Pepper Changes Clothes
story.body: In the garden, bell pepper babies all wore green clothes at first. The sun shone on them every day, and the bell pepper babies felt warm, so they changed into yellow clothes. A few days later, they felt even warmer and changed into red clothes. A little rabbit hopped over and said in surprise, "Wow! Can you do magic?" The bell pepper babies smiled and said, "The sun helped us change!" The rabbit picked a red bell pepper, took a bite, and it was crisp, sweet, and juicy. It happily shared with its friends, and everyone sat together, crunching away with joy. The bell pepper babies were happy too, because they let their friends taste the sweet flavor.

knowledge.title: Why Are Bell Peppers So Sweet?
knowledge.body: Bell peppers are related to chili peppers but are not spicy—they are sweet! Red bell peppers are sweeter than green ones because they stayed on the vine longer and gathered more sugar. They are rich in vitamin C, which helps keep you healthy and your skin glowing.
